Aegolism  

Description

1: Stacking: Block new spell if slot 3 is effect 'Max Hitpoints' and < 2100
2: Increase Max Hitpoints by 1100
3: Increase HP when cast by 1100
4: Increase AC by 54
5: Stacking2 v1 69: 2100

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 750 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 14 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You are filled with the power of Aegolism.
Cast on other: Soandso 's eye gleams with the power of Aegolism.
Effect Fades: Your aegolism fades.

Game Description

Cloaks your target in an aura of protection, granting them increased hit points and armor class for 2 hour(s) 30.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Akkirus Aego Buffer
  • Spell: Aegolism

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Aegolism
ClassLevel
CLR60
Expansion:

Duration:
2 hour(s) 30.0 mins
  • Comments (23)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (42)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Vicar Delin - 125pp 8gp 1sp 9cp
Post Comment
Made up word?
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2012 at 7:10 PM Rating: Excellent
Oxgoad
1,738 posts
What the heck is "aegolism" anyway?

Egoism that took the L-train?

Drop info, an ancient caretaker, Sleeper's Tomb.

# Sep 15 2004 at 8:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791337575
View User Forum
Scholar
27 posts
As of the September 13, 2004 patch this spell no longer costs a peridot to cast. Clerics rejoice.

Elvanaria Blueleaf
Divine Servant of Tunare
(Kane Bayle Server)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 28 2004 at 4:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey....isnt this also known as Virtue? :)

# Sep 30 2004 at 8:34 AM Rating: Default

▲ Page top
RE: /shrug
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2004 at 6:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344491328
Sage
150 posts
Virtue is an upgrade to ageo
▲ Page top
Stacking
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2004 at 10:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793707615
15 posts
Shouldn't Aego stack (or overwrite) potc ?
I tried to cast it on a friend, but it wouldn't stick untill she dropped potc.
▲ Page top
RE: Stacking
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 1:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
It used to, but they changed it, since PoTc/PoTg/BoT9 have mana regen, where aego does not. casters often would be upset to have their mana regen buff overwritten with aego/virtue, so they fixed it.
▲ Page top
Can't find it
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2004 at 4:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793707615
15 posts
Has something changes with this spell? Is it nodrop now, or vendor sold? I haven't seen it for sale on bazaar on Brell for over a month. Lots of group aego for sale but no single target one.
▲ Page top
aego lvl
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2004 at 10:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792099777
7 posts
The minimum lvl to get aego casted on you is lvl 45 now. 46 to get virtue.
▲ Page top
Lvl Min for Spell?

__DEL__1593966481229

# Apr 29 2003 at 12:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts

▲ Page top
RE: does it take 4?
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2003 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257524861
10 posts
this spell takes one dot. Blessing of Aego is a group cast spell which takes 4.
▲ Page top
RE: does it take 4?
QuoteReply
# Nov 03 2003 at 10:53 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Yes, I am aware of that, the message i originally replied to asked if this spell took four. Notew that while this appears to be a reply to the question abvout 1 or 2, my reply predates the question by about a month. Not sure what happened to the original message.

# Apr 15 2004 at 7:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757078569
96 posts
hehe, Cheap... Perhaps where you come from.

I have only been looking for it for about a week, but some *&%&^%( in the bazaar on Torvonnilous is trying to sell it for 12000 plat. Yeah, that is right, a lvl 60 spell that is going to be out dated in 2 lvl's this guy expects 12000 plat.

I am a little frustrated at this point. I am going to get a gang together and kill some stuff to get my spell.

pst. cheap in the bazaar, /laugh
